belier.intro: The Full Moon reaches exact, total illumination today, having moved into Aquarius and your eleventh house of community and shared vision. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your own sign, and this peak arrives as the natural extension of yesterday's career culmination into something more collective. What matters now is who stands beside you as you carry your recent achievement forward.
belier.love: A partner becomes part of your wider circle in a new way today, perhaps meeting friends or joining a shared project. Let the relationship expand beyond just the two of you.
belier.work: A professional achievement finds its true meaning today through the community or team that shares in it. Celebrate publicly rather than privately; this Full Moon favors visible connection.
belier.energy: Your fire finds an unusually collective outlet today, energized by shared purpose rather than solo achievement. Let a group carry some of the momentum you built alone this week.
belier.intuition: At exact fullness, a sense of which people genuinely support your becoming, versus who simply admires the results, reaches total clarity. Trust this fully today.
belier.mantra: I let my community share in what I have built.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Full Moon reaches total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your tenth house of career and public standing at its most intense point. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your twelfth house, and this peak arrives after weeks of private processing now finding a very public expression. What you have quietly clarified in solitude is ready to be shown to the world today.
taureau.love: A partner witnesses a public step you take today that surprises even you. Let their support meet you in this more visible version of yourself.
taureau.work: A career matter reaches its most public, most decisive point today. The private clarity you found this month is ready to become a visible commitment or announcement.
taureau.energy: Your earth element meets the Full Moon's total intensity through grounded, public action today. Step forward rather than retreating into your usual privacy.
taureau.intuition: At exact fullness, the private realization you have carried all month about your true direction becomes something you are ready to say out loud. Trust that readiness.
taureau.mantra: I show the world what I have quietly become.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Full Moon reaches exact fullness today in Aquarius, lighting your ninth house of belief and broader vision at its peak intensity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your eleventh house, and yesterday's clarity about a close relationship now expands into a larger question about what you believe your life is for. This is a day for wide, honest perspective.
gemeaux.love: A relationship truth that became clear yesterday now connects to a bigger question about what you want your life to look like. Discuss the larger vision, not just the immediate matter.
gemeaux.work: A long-term plan involving travel, publishing, or education reaches its clearest expression today. The Full Moon at total illumination favors bold commitment to the larger vision.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy expands outward today rather than focusing narrowly. Let your thinking range widely; the connections you make today carry real significance.
gemeaux.intuition: At exact fullness, a belief about what truly matters to you becomes undeniable. Trust the wide-angle clarity this rare peak offers.
gemeaux.mantra: I trust the wide clarity of this rare moment.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Full Moon reaches total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your eighth house of intimacy and shared trust at its most intense point. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your tenth house, and yesterday's relationship reckoning now deepens into the most vulnerable layer of trust between two people. This is a day for real emotional exposure.
cancer.love: The turning point a relationship reached yesterday deepens today into genuine emotional exposure. Let yourself be truly seen, fears and all; the reward at this peak is real closeness.
cancer.work: A shared financial or professional trust matter reaches its most honest point today. Say plainly what you need from a partnership; ambiguity has no room at this exact peak.
cancer.energy: Your water element meets its most intense expression of the month today. Let feeling move through you fully rather than managing or containing it.
cancer.intuition: At exact fullness, the deepest layer of a shared trust becomes completely visible. Trust what you feel without needing to justify it logically today.
cancer.mantra: I let myself be fully known today.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Full Moon reaches exact, total illumination today in Aquarius, your opposite sign, lighting your seventh house of partnership with the sharpest mirror of the month. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your ninth house, and yesterday's practical health culmination now meets the deepest reflection a close relationship can offer. Your own Sun keeps you warm even as this mirror asks for total honesty.
lion.love: A partner reflects the truest version of you today, at this peak, more clearly than at any other point this month. Meet their eyes and their honesty fully; do not perform for this mirror.
lion.work: A collaboration or negotiation reaches its most honest and decisive point today. State exactly what you need; the exact Full Moon rewards total clarity over charm.
lion.energy: Your fire meets its opposite element's clarity today in an unusually productive combination. Let structure and warmth combine into decisive, generous action.
lion.intuition: At exact fullness, a partnership shows you the truest reflection of yourself all month has offered. Receive it fully, without deflection.
lion.mantra: I meet this mirror with total honesty.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Full Moon reaches total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your sixth house of daily service at its most intense point. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your eighth house, and yesterday's creative peak now grounds into practical, daily terms. This is a day to translate yesterday's joy into sustainable structure.
vierge.love: The vulnerability shared with a partner yesterday now asks to become a daily practice, not just a peak moment. Build a small, consistent habit of the closeness you found.
vierge.work: A daily routine or health practice reaches its clearest, most decisive form today. The exact Full Moon favors committing fully to the structure that has proven itself.
vierge.energy: Your earth element meets total intensity today through practical, grounded action. Channel yesterday's creative peak into today's concrete follow-through.
vierge.intuition: At exact fullness, what genuine trust requires from you in daily practice, not just peak moments, becomes completely clear. Build accordingly.
vierge.mantra: I turn today's clarity into daily practice.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Full Moon reaches exact, total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your fifth house of creativity and joy at its peak. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your seventh house, and yesterday's domestic resolution now finds joyful, creative expression. This is a day for genuine delight after recent seriousness.
balance.love: Playfulness and genuine joy with a partner today balance the recent seriousness well. Let romance be light and expressive rather than another negotiation.
balance.work: A creative project reaches its most visible and celebrated point today. Share what you have made; the exact Full Moon rewards being seen at your most authentic and expressive.
balance.energy: Your air element meets total intensity today through creative self-expression. Let yourself be genuinely delighted rather than measured.
balance.intuition: At exact fullness, what brings you real joy, distinct from what merely looks appealing, becomes completely clear. Trust this distinction fully today.
balance.mantra: I let genuine joy lead me today.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Full Moon reaches total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your fourth house of home and roots at its most intense point. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your sixth house, and yesterday's communication breakthrough now settles into the emotional foundation of home. This is a day to bring clarity back to where you truly rest.
scorpion.love: A conversation with a partner about home, family, or long-term roots reaches its most honest point today. Let the practical clarity from yesterday inform a deeper domestic decision now.
scorpion.work: A home-based matter or family responsibility reaches full resolution today. Whatever you decided yesterday about daily habits now extends into your domestic foundation.
scorpion.energy: Your water runs at total intensity today, most naturally expressed through your home environment. Tend to your space as an extension of tending yourself.
scorpion.intuition: At exact fullness, how your family history shapes your daily habits becomes completely visible. Trust this connection and act on what it reveals.
scorpion.mantra: I let my home reflect my clearest truth.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Full Moon reaches exact, total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your third house of communication and immediate connection at its peak. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your fifth house, and yesterday's financial clarity now finds its clearest expression in words. This is a day to say plainly what you have come to know about your own worth.
sagittaire.love: A direct, honest conversation with a partner about what you truly value today lands with unusual force. Say it plainly; the exact Full Moon rewards clarity over charm.
sagittaire.work: A written agreement, an important message, or a public statement about your worth reaches completion today. Send what you have been drafting; the timing will not be clearer than this.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire meets total intensity today through decisive, well-chosen words. Let your natural enthusiasm find its most precise expression.
sagittaire.intuition: At exact fullness, the words that best capture what you have learned about your own worth this month arrive easily. Trust them and say them.
sagittaire.mantra: I say plainly what I now know to be true.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Full Moon reaches total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your second house of resources and self-worth at its most intense point. Saturn, your ruling planet, continues retrograde alongside Neptune in your fourth house, and yesterday's identity culmination now grounds into concrete, material terms. This is a day to give your renewed sense of self a tangible foundation.
capricorne.love: A partner supports the fullest version of you that emerged yesterday, and today that support can take a practical form, a gesture, a shared resource, a plan. Let material care express emotional depth.
capricorne.work: A financial matter connected to your recent personal clarity reaches its most decisive point today. Ask for what you know you are worth, in concrete terms.
capricorne.energy: Your earth element meets total intensity today through material, grounded action. Translate yesterday's identity clarity into something you can hold or measure.
capricorne.intuition: At exact fullness, what your identity is genuinely worth, beyond family expectation, becomes completely clear in practical terms. Trust this grounded knowing.
capricorne.mantra: I give my truest self a solid foundation.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Full Moon arrives in your own sign today at exact, total illumination, the most potent moment of the entire month landing directly in your first house of identity. Pluto retrograde continues transforming your sense of personal power from within this same sign, and Saturn and Neptune remain retrograde in your third house. Everything this month has quietly built toward culminates today, in you, at its peak.
verseau.love: A partner sees the truest, most fully illuminated version of you today, and this is the moment to let that visibility deepen the bond completely. Do not soften what is emerging.
verseau.work: A personal or professional transformation, building since Pluto's long retrograde began, reaches its most visible expression today. Step into it publicly and without hesitation.
verseau.energy: Your air element meets its own sign's Full Moon at total intensity, the rarest and most potent alignment of the month. Use this peak deliberately; it will not return soon.
verseau.intuition: At exact fullness in your own sign, the entire month's slow rebuilding of your personal power becomes completely, undeniably clear. Trust yourself fully today, more than on any other day this year.
verseau.mantra: I stand fully illuminated in who I have become.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Full Moon reaches total illumination today in Aquarius, lighting your twelfth house of quiet reflection at its most intense and paradoxical point. Neptune, your ruling planet, continues retrograde alongside Saturn in your first house, and yesterday's community clarity now turns inward into something deeply private. This is a day when the peak of the month arrives not as spectacle but as quiet, total knowing.
poissons.love: A private, wordless understanding with a partner deepens today more than any conversation could. Trust the connection that needs no explanation.
poissons.work: Quiet completion, closing a chapter, releasing what no longer serves a project, matters more today than any new beginning. Let this Full Moon mark an ending well made.
poissons.energy: Your water element meets its own ruling planet's retrograde and the month's peak simultaneously today. Solitude and rest serve you better than any outward action.
poissons.intuition: At exact fullness, the entire month's redefinition of your identity, guided by Neptune's retrograde, arrives as a single, quiet, complete knowing. Trust it without needing to explain it to anyone.
poissons.mantra: I trust the quiet knowing that needs no explanation.
poissons.author: Sibylle
